Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 8080. protected by 1 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: azure-blob, grpc. runtime dependencies: MLflow, MySQL, OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, ame, kubernetes, name, service. defining 2 API spec type(s) across 7 struct(s) with 40 total fields. with 21 operator config constants (1 image references). exposing 64 Prometheus metrics. with 1 ingress route(s).
